response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video content as a promotional teaser for Oozora Subaru's 7th Anniversary Live. 2. Monitored video for full vocal songs. 3. Located performance of 'Fure-Adesu!' at 04:48. 4. Extracted song metadata from on-screen text at 04:49. 5. Performed search for lyrics using the Japanese title and original artist (Oozora Subaru). 6. Retrieved full lyrics. 7. Constructed JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video serves as a promotional teaser for Oozora Subaru's 7th Anniversary Live titled 'LOVE ME!'. It features a montage of various Hololive members, a countdown, and a short, upbeat 3D musical performance of her original song 'Fure-Adesu!'.

scenes.description: A promotional montage featuring various Hololive members, followed by a countdown to the event start. No full vocal performance occurs during this time.
Oozora Subaru performs a short segment of her original song 'Fure-Adesu!'. On-screen text identifies the song and its composers.
